cards.name: 6 of Wands
cards.interpretation: success, victory, triumph, rewards, recognition, praise, acclaim, pride

cards.name: ⅩⅡ The Hanged Man, reversed
cards.interpretation: stalling, disinterest, stagnation, avoiding sacrifice, standstill, apathy

cards.name: 4 of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: recovery, awakening, re-entering world, release from isolation, restlessness, burnout
